nodes.label: Hive Digest (monthly) Cursor Automation
nodes.rationale: Preferred scheduled path; cloud agents could not create the automation via web UI due to Cloudflare bot check, so settings are pasted in the dashboard. Repo keeps GitHub Actions as fallback.

nodes.label: Node Agent (npm start --prefix agent)
nodes.rationale: Always use the existing Node agent rather than reimplementing research, ranking, or email by hand.

nodes.label: SMTP Newsletter Delivery
nodes.rationale: Sending uses nodemailer SMTP with env secrets; Resend and Resend MCP are explicitly disallowed.

nodes.label: Cross-Source Fallback Chain
nodes.rationale: Falls back arXiv → OpenAlex → HN-only; soft-fails individual queries and opens per-host circuits after exhausted rate-limit cycles so backups do not keep hammering a host.

nodes.label: Insight Value Ranking
nodes.rationale: Scores are ranking-only and never included in email body or subject.

nodes.label: Dark Hive Theme
nodes.rationale: Emailed HTML must always use the dark Hive theme; do not switch to light.

nodes.label: Delete Merged PR Branch Workflow
nodes.rationale: Complements or replaces GitHub Automatically delete head branches when that toggle is unavailable to automation tokens; never deletes main/master.

nodes.label: Hive Digest Monthly GitHub Actions Workflow
nodes.rationale: GitHub Actions cron is UTC-only, so schedule is 30 3 1 * * (03:30 UTC = 09:00 IST on the 1st).
nodes.norm_label: hive digest monthly github actions workflow

nodes.label: Validation and Insight Ranking
nodes.rationale: Scores are never shown in the newsletter; higher-scoring stories appear first and weaker sections sort last.

nodes.label: Cursor Automation (Preferred)
nodes.rationale: Cursor Automation is the preferred scheduled newsletter path; GitHub Actions is the fallback.

nodes.label: Anthropic Messages API
nodes.rationale: Browser calls api.anthropic.com directly with web search; only succeeds inside a Claude.ai artifact or equivalent proxy — plain browser open has no client-side API key.

nodes.label: scoreInsight
nodes.rationale: Insight scores reorder sections and filter entries but are never surfaced in the UI or exported newsletter.

nodes.label: NEWSLETTER_DARK Theme Palette
nodes.rationale: Generated newsletter HTML is always dark Hive theme; insight scores are never included.
